articles.title: Peppermint Oil Study Reveals Natural Blood Pressure Solution Big Pharma Won't Touch
articles.summary: UK clinical trial shows peppermint oil drops systolic blood pressure by 8.5 mmHg — rivaling prescription drugs without side effects. Pharmaceutical companies ignore cheap, natural alternatives that threaten their billion-dollar hypertension monopoly.

articles.title: ImmunityBio Crashes After FDA Exposes Fraudulent Cancer Cure Claims

articles.title: Psychiatric Industrial Complex Manufactured Mental Health Crisis With Fake Serotonin Theory
